title: Vault Maison Research Insight
description: Schema for structured research insights used in AI-assisted luxury brand strategy development.

id.description: Unique identifier for the insight (format: VM-XXX).

subcategory.description: Specific subcategory within the primary category.

finding.description: The core insight or finding, stated as a complete, factual sentence.

source.description: The source(s) of the finding, including publication name and year.

confidence.description: Confidence level in the finding's accuracy.

impact.description: Assessed impact level on the Vault Maison strategy.

tags.description: Relevant tags for cross-referencing and retrieval.
